packet_markdown:
# Lumina Hollywood building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: lumina-hollywood-1522-gordon-st
- Address: 1522 Gordon St, Los Angeles, CA 90028
- Primary URL: https://luminahollywood.com/
- Management company: Morguard
- Recommended status: tour_candidate
- Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 3 (medium, evidence count 1)
- Management: 3 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Amenity: 4 (medium, evidence count 3)
- Community stability: 3 (medium, evidence count 1)
- Location fit: 4
- Pricing transparency: 3

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: unknown
- Location noise risk: medium
- Security risk: low
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] The official site continues to show active leasing for studio through two-bedroom homes. Source: Lumina Hollywood official site (https://luminahollywood.com/). Note: Official materials show live inventory for studio, one-bedroom, and two-bedroom homes.
- [review] Apartments.com currently lists stacked washer/dryer, pool, fitness center, bicycle storage, and media room. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/lumina-hollywood-los-angeles-ca/nrmg09n/). Note: Current listing shows stacked washer/dryer, pool, fitness center, bicycle storage, and media center.
- [public_record] The BBB profile currently shows an A+ business rating, although the building is not BBB accredited. Source: Better Business Bureau (https://www.bbb.org/us/ca/los-angeles/profile/not-elsewhere-classified/lumina-hollywood-apartments-1216-1000054409). Note: BBB showed an A+ rating while also noting the property is not accredited.

## Open questions
- Confirm EV charging, package handling, parking, and any formal coworking or meeting space.

## Notes
Tour candidate with moderate confidence. Lumina looks operationally solid enough to keep alive, especially with concierge and controlled access, but some day-to-day logistics are still unclear and should be checked before touring priority rises further.
